resources.string: Recent mood context will appear here after the first reply.
Share what feels most present right now. MindEase will combine your recent mood record, trend, and latest suggestion before replying.
What feels heavy, loud, or hard to untangle right now?
I feel overwhelmed. Can you help me ground myself in the next minute?
I\'ve been stressed about study pressure for days. Can we sort out one next step?
My mind won\'t slow down tonight. Can you help me settle before sleep?
A calm conversation space that blends your recent mood records, trends, and suggestions into each reply.
